title: FalaMadeira Structured Course — canonical 168-day curriculum outline
description: Curriculum design for plan step complete-structured-course-content. 6 months x 28 course days (4 weeks of 7). Existing situations keep their relative order within their month (only course.day renumbers to canonical blocks); net-new days are authored against the weekly themes below. Levels are locked per month: M1 L0-L1/A1, M2 L1-L2/A2, M3 L2-L3/A2-B1, M4 L3/B1, M5 L4/B1-B2, M6 L5/B2. Themes serve understand/speak/use/belong and draw on the goal tracks (survival/host/social/bureaucracy/work) plus Madeira culture, festivals, weather, food and geography.
day_blocks: month m owns days (m-1)*28+1 .. m*28; week k owns days (k-1)*7+1 .. k*7

weeks.theme: Presence & first exchanges: greetings, café, numbers, clarification, directions, opinions
Being a person: self-introduction, time, prices, first past tense, ser/estar, routines
Needs & requests: talking about others, TER, PODER, shopping, pharmacy, connectors
Time travel & daily life: imperfect, future, conditionals, restaurant, home, big numbers

months.status: existing 21 days keep d29-49; 7 net-new days fill week 8 (d50-56)

weeks.theme: Registers & the complete present: tu vs você, all persons, preterite+imperfect, telephone
Past, feelings & the island: present perfect, reflexives, emotions, Madeiran geography, complex sentences
Advanced structures: vocês, future subjunctive, personal infinitive, abstract topics, formal writing, beaches & hiking
Grammar to the street — running your daily life (L2/A2): market, post office, phone appointments, household problems, narrating your week, plans, stress test

months.theme: Fluency in motion — speed, services and local conversation
months.status: existing 7 days renumber d50-56 -> d57-63 (week 9); 21 net-new days fill weeks 10-12 (d64-84)

weeks.theme: Consolidation & mastery: speed/automaticity, tense system, register fluency, professional/formal, Madeira in depth, complex structures, grand stress test
Town services day-to-day (L2/A2): pharmacy beyond basics, hairdresser, car & petrol station, bank & Multibanco, Junta errands, shop returns, errand-day stress test
Neighbourhood conversations (L3/B1): meeting neighbours properly, family talk, Madeira weather small talk, asking/offering help, local recommendations, café-counter chat, stress test
Island life (L3/B1): levada walks, the sea & fish talk, local produce, football small talk, village visits, getting around the island, month-3 grand stress test

months.theme: Local slang & culture — belonging in the bairro
months.status: existing 4 days renumber d57/64/71/78 -> d85-88 (order preserved); 24 net-new days fill d89-112

weeks.theme: Belonging in the bairro: neighbourhood small talk, the arraial, Madeiran expressions & humour, month-4 checkpoint, poncha-bar rounds & toasts, Madeiran words in the wild, reacting like a local
The festival calendar: Festa da Flor, Christmas & Missas do Parto, New Year in Funchal, santos populares, the vindima (harvest), inviting & being invited, festival-weekend stress test

Food & the table: espetada night, ordering like a local (lapas, bolo do caco, milho frito), talking recipes, the fish market, coffee culture (bica, chinesa, garoto), table etiquette, food-day stress test
Knowing the island: playing the local guide, microclimates & north/south divide, boats & whales, planning Porto Santo, island history & stories, directions like a local, month-4 grand stress test

months.theme: Problem solving — when things go wrong
months.status: existing 4 days renumber d85/92/99/106 -> d113-116 (order preserved); 24 net-new days fill d117-140

weeks.theme: Problem-solving foundations (B1): complaining politely, negotiating & arranging, repairing misunderstandings, checkpoint, returning a faulty purchase, disputing a wrong bill, the no-show tradesperson

House & property problems (B1): water damage & insurance, the quote that grew, neighbour friction, landlord/tenant deposit & repairs, power cuts & utilities, the midnight plumber, bad-week stress test

Bureaucracy pushback (B2): the missing document at Finanças, cancelled appointments, chasing a stuck process, health-centre referrals, contesting a fine, escalating without burning bridges, bureaucratic-marathon stress test
Money & work friction (B2): the client who won't pay, renegotiating deadlines, the guest refund, price-rise conversations, misdelivered orders, saying no professionally, month-5 grand stress test

months.status: existing 4 days renumber d113/120/127/134 -> d141-144 (order preserved); 24 net-new days fill d145-168

weeks.theme: Resident-level expression: storytelling, formal email & office Portuguese, debating opinions, immersion checkpoint, humour & irony, the art of indirectness, reacting to stories like a native

Formal & administrative mastery: formal letters & requerimentos, reading contracts, speaking in meetings, official phone calls at full speed, money & tax vocabulary, complaining in writing (livro de reclamações), administrative-gauntlet stress test

Deep social integration: news & local politics carefully, toasts & speaking at gatherings, condolences & congratulations rituals, gossip & discretion, helping a newcomer in Portuguese, talking with the older generation, full-social-weekend stress test

Capstone — living the island in Portuguese: a full errand day in town, hosting end-to-end, improvising when plans collapse, extreme listening (fast/noisy/real), your Madeira story, the long unscripted conversation, graduation: the integrated-resident final

video_policy: one verified (YouTube oEmbed HTTP 200) European-Portuguese or Madeira-culture video per week block where a genuinely matching real video can be found; existing verified videos count for their weeks (w1: sit-d1, w3: sit-d15 + sit-d16, w13: arraial food video). Never fabricate an id; weeks with no verifiable match are left absent and reported.
